ValidationRule.description: Equipment Type is required when load is posted. Carrier assignment depends on equipment availability.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Status__c)), OR(Status__c = "posted", Status__c = "quoted", Status__c = "tendered", Status__c = "accepted", Status__c = "dispatched", Status__c = "in_transit", Status__c = "delivered", Status__c = "pod_captured", Status__c = "invoiced", Status__c = "settled", Status__c = "completed"), ISBLANK(Equipment_Type__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Equipment Type is required for posted loads. Specify the equipment needed (e.g., Flatbed, Van, Reefer, Tank) before posting.
